blocks.text: Packaging Solutions Manufacturer Vietnam
Innovative Sustainable Packaging for Every Industry

At XinYuan, we provide custom packaging solutions that combine innovation, sustainability, and precision manufacturing. Our integrated network of facilities in Vietnam and China delivers premium packaging for brands across the world. From luxury folding cartons to corrugated retail packaging, and adhesive labels to instruction manuals, every solution is engineered for performance, branding, and efficiency.
Our team ensures that each product we deliver not only protects your goods but also enhances your brand identity, logistics, and shelf appeal — from concept design to global shipment.
Allow us to support you with innovative, sustainable, and cost-effective packaging tailored to your products and industry.
• Retail packing

Durable, visually appealing packaging designed to protect and present retail products with impact. Our retail packing combines strong construction with high-quality printing, ensuring your products stand out on every shelf. Ideal for: FMCG, e-commerce, and in-store retail displays.

blocks.alt: hands holding instruction manual with assembly diagram

blocks.text: • Instructions & Manual Printing

We print product manuals, inserts, and user guides with precision and clarity. Our hybrid offset and digital lines ensure accurate color, readable text, and lasting durability — essential for electronics, appliances, and health products. Ideal for: Product instructions, safety manuals, and assembly guides.
• Labels & stickers

High-quality adhesive labels and stickers that reinforce brand identity and reliability. Printed on FSC®-certified stocks with vibrant inks, they ensure durability and adhesion under all conditions. Ideal for: Consumer goods, cosmetics, food, and logistics labeling.
• Cardboard, Trays & inserts
Practical inserts, trays, and dividers that secure and organize your products. Engineered for protection and sustainability, they optimize material use while supporting automated assembly lines.

blocks.alt: custom handle folding boxes with blue and orange graphics

blocks.text: • Folding cartons

Lightweight, versatile paperboard boxes for consumer packaging that combines elegance with production efficiency. We offer offset printing, foil stamping, and lamination options for a professional retail finish. Ideal for: Cosmetics, food, pharmaceuticals, and retail brands.

blocks.alt: transparent plastic boxes with compartments and lids

blocks.text: • Artifical Packing

Smart, reusable plastic and hybrid packaging designed for visibility, durability, and protection. Our PP and HDPE molded boxes offer long-lasting performance for logistics and storage. Ideal for: Industry, e-commerce, logistics, and warehouse use.
Delivering Smarter Packaging, Every Step of the Way.
From concept to delivery, our solutions combine creativity, protection, and sustainability to support your business growth.
Chosen by over 25,000 top-tier brands and businesses of every scale.

More than 25,000 companies worldwide rely on XinYuan for reliable, export-ready packaging solutions.Our clients include both global corporations and fast-growing local brands — all benefiting from our certified production and end-to-end logistics support.
